events.title: COCA Creative Complex Opening — Titik Dua
events.description: Titik Dua boutique hotel unveils the COCA Creative Complex on 16 July 2026: four spaces launching simultaneously — Coca Artspace (rotating gallery in dialogue with contemporary Indonesian voices, curated by Non Frasa), Coca Selekta (Ubud's first dedicated vinyl listening bar), Coca Theater (home to Ubud: Cinecurious — indoor screenings, masterclasses, and film culture panels launched in partnership with international film figure John Badalu), and Coca Dining. A new multi-format cultural anchor for the upper Sanggingan creative corridor.
events.short_description: Titik Dua unveils four new cultural spaces on July 16: gallery (Non Frasa), vinyl listening bar, film theatre (John Badalu), and dining.
